name: King Of The Chat
short_description: Transform your Twitch chat into a marble battle! Viewers spend channel points or bits spawn in as marbles for a plinko-style challenge, earning points which can be spent attacking the throne. This stream overlay to automatically incentivizes viewer engagement, non-obtrusively, with zero effort!
detailed_description:
Want to earn more donations with no extra effort? 

King of the Chat is an interactive Twitch overlay game that transforms your viewers into marble warriors fighting for the throne. By simply spending channel points, viewers can spawn marbles into an exciting plinko-style challenge, earn points, and launch attacks to seize control of the throne.

This game runs 100% automatically, keeping your chat lively, engaging, and even boosting revenue—all while you focus on your content. Whether it's channel points, bits, or subs, King of the Chat gives an incentive for viewers to interact with your stream while helping you monetize effortlessly.

Key Features

  • 🎭 Seamless Twitch Integration – Authorize your twitch account with 1 click and you're done. Everything stays local on your device.

  • 🗣️900+ Unique TTS Voices - All generated locally on your machine without requiring a cloud provider. 

  • 🔄 Automatic and Non-Obtrusive – Maximum incentive for viewers while using minimal screen space on your stream.

  • 🛠 Customizable – Need to rearrange your stream layout? No problem! Moving and scaling is as simple as clicking and dragging.

  • 📈Scales with your Audience – Channel point costs adjust atomically to suit your live viewer count. 

  • 🏅 Individual Player Profiles – Player scores are stored locally and persistent across all streams.

  • 💲Boost Monetization – Encourage bits and subs by making it more rewarding to join the fight for the throne.

  • 🪟 Transparent Window – Adding to your stream is as easy as adding a new input to OBS thanks to KOTC's transparent background. 

Why Streamers Love It

✔ Engages lurkers – The throne mechanic keeps viewers invested, leading to longer watch times. With a bit of luck, everybody has a chance

✔ Gives opportunity for long term fans to have a moment in the spotlight without paying any money. 

✔ Bit donations reward everybody, not just the donor, resulting in other fans thanking the donor as well. 

Get ready to crown a new king! Will your viewers rise to power or be overthrown?

Try King of the Chat today and watch your community come alive!

Let the battle begin!

⚠️Twitch Channel Points Access Required (Twitch Affiliates/Partners only) ⚠️
